# Agent Incident Relay MCP

> Agent Incident Relay MCP - Article 73 5-clock broadcaster

`agent-incident-relay-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install agent-incident-relay-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx agent-incident-relay-mcp
```

## Tools

- `classify_incident`
- `relay_incident`
- `check_clock_status`
- `generate_authority_payload`
- `sign_relay`
- `list_regimes` — Return the full regime spec — clocks, authorities, payload schemas.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/agent-incident-relay-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-incident-relay-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
